summary_text: Updated [tests/test_scheduler_gate1.py](/Users/masayuki/Dev/x-auto/tests/test_scheduler_gate1.py) and [tests/test_quote_tweet.py](/Users/masayuki/Dev/x-auto/tests/test_quote_tweet.py) only. The fixes align the tests with current `scheduler.py` behavior: - Removed the stale `scheduler.subprocess` patching and replaced old Gate 2 subprocess assertions with current thumbnail QA field checks. - Added passing thumbnail QA defaults to test post helpers. - Updated the image-size constant expectation from `100 * 1024` to `95 * 1024`. - Adjusted quote-tweet tests to match current behavior: body URLs are no longer auto-extracted into replies, and validation no longer blocks them just for being in the body when other gates pass. - Updated note promo expectations to match current validation behavior, which no longer rewrites to `body_ja` or blocks English-only note promos. Verification: - `./venv/bin/python -m pytest tests/test_scheduler_gate1.py tests/test_quote_tweet.py -x --tb=short` - Result: `30 passed`
